description: Initial screen state: A task description overlay is visible, providing instructions for the user testing session. Behind it, the Google homepage is partially visible.
frame_description: A task description overlay is shown over a blurred Google search page.

description: User clicks the 'Start task' button to begin the study.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Start task' button at the bottom of the overlay.

description: The task description overlay disappears, revealing the Google search homepage.
frame_description: The Google homepage is now fully visible after the overlay is dismissed.

description: User clicks on the Google search bar to activate it.
frame_description: The user clicks the search bar on the Google homepage.

description: The mobile keyboard appears and a 'Trending searches' list is displayed.
frame_description: The keyboard is visible at the bottom of the screen, and trending search suggestions appear below the search bar.

description: User types 'homelone australia bank st george' into the search bar.
frame_description: The search query 'homelone australia bank st george' is typed into the input field.

description: User clicks the search button on the keyboard to execute the search.
frame_description: The user clicks the search icon on the mobile keyboard.

description: The page navigates to the Google search results for 'homelone australia bank st george'.
frame_description: The Google search results page loads.

description: User scrolls down through the search results.
frame_description: The user is scrolling down the list of search results on Google.

description: User hovers over the 'Aussie' search result.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the Aussie Home Loans search result.

description: User clicks on the 'Aussie' search result.
frame_description: The user clicks the link for Aussie Home Loans.

description: The page navigates to the Aussie Home Loans website.
frame_description: The Aussie Home Loans homepage loads.

description: User clicks the 'I want to refinance' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the refinance option on the Aussie homepage.

description: A loading screen appears with the message 'Loading... You're moving along nicely.'
frame_description: A purple loading screen is displayed.

description: The first question of the form appears: 'What is your current loan balance?'.
frame_description: The screen updates to show a question about the user's current loan balance.

description: User clicks on the loan balance input field.
frame_description: The user taps the text box to enter their loan balance.

description: User types '1000000' into the loan balance field.
frame_description: The value '$ 1,000,000' is entered into the input field.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the purple 'NEXT' button.

description: The next question appears: 'Please tell us more about your current loan.'
frame_description: The screen transitions to a new set of questions about the current loan.

description: User hesitates for several seconds while reading the questions on the screen.
frame_description: The user is looking at the screen without interacting.

description: User clicks the 'No' radio button.
frame_description: The user selects the 'No' option for the fixed rate question.

description: Page transitions to 'Who is your current lender'.
frame_description: The screen changes from the loan details form to a lender search page.

description: The next question appears: 'Who is your current lender'.
frame_description: The screen updates to ask for the user's current lender.

description: User types 'St george' into the lender search field.
frame_description: The user types 'St george' into the search box.

description: User selects 'St George' from the search results dropdown.
frame_description: A list of suggested lenders is visible, and the user taps on the 'St George' entry.

description: Page transitions to 'How much do you think your property is worth?'.
frame_description: The screen changes to a new question about property value with a currency input field.

description: User types '1100000' into the property value field.
frame_description: The user enters a numerical value into the property worth input field.

description: User clicks the purple 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: The property value is entered, and the user clicks the 'NEXT' button at the bottom.

description: Page transitions to 'What's your refinancing goal?'.
frame_description: The screen changes to a list of refinancing goals like 'Decrease repayments' and 'Pay off loan faster'.

description: User clicks the 'Pay off loan faster' button.
frame_description: The user taps the button labeled 'Pay off loan faster'.

description: Page transitions to 'How will this property be used?'.
frame_description: The screen changes to a question about whether the property is a home or investment.

description: Page transitions to 'Are any of the following important to you when choosing a lender?'.
frame_description: The screen changes to a multi-select list of features like 'Offset/Redraw' and 'Major lender'.

description: User clicks the 'Major lender' option.
frame_description: The user taps the 'Major lender' icon/button.

description: Page transitions to 'What do you think your credit history is?'.
frame_description: The screen changes to a list of credit history options.

description: User clicks the 'Excellent - No issues' button.
frame_description: The user taps the button labeled 'Excellent - No issues'.

description: User clicks the 'I'm an employee' button.
frame_description: The user taps the button labeled 'I'm an employee'.

description: Page transitions to 'One last thing, what's your first name?'.
frame_description: The screen changes to a page with a first name input field.

description: User types 'Jane Doe' into the name input field.
frame_description: The user types their name into the text input field.

description: User clicks the 'GET MY HOME LOAN MATCHES' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the large purple button at the bottom of the screen.

description: Loading screen with message 'Loading.... You're moving along nicely.' appears.
frame_description: A white screen with a purple animated logo and loading text is visible.

description: Page transitions to 'Your home loan options await!'.
frame_description: The screen changes to a page asking for a mobile phone number to access results.

description: Mobile phone number input field appears.
frame_description: An input field with a country code selector (+61) appears on the screen.

description: User types '9346464848' into the phone number field.

description: User types an Australian mobile phone number into the input field.

description: An error message 'Something Went Wrong' appears on the screen.

description: User clicks the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button.

description: User clicks the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button again.
frame_description: The button is pressed a second time.
